ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing model serving APIs, including input validation, output formatting, error handling, authentication, and versioning.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of software reverse engineering techniques.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of software reverse engineering techniques.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-005 (AI, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4150 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.415, ddat=0.413, onet=0.411) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4150 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-005 (composite 0.4150) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4150 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4150 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4150, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
